title: Wolfy's Extra Expansion
description:
This mod aims to add new content to minecraft, mainly focusing on
weaponry
body:
# Welcome to my expansion mod! This is a mod that aims to add new content, mostly new equipment

<center>

### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click)
[![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN)

</center>

## DISCLAIMERS:

### Forge version requires GeckoLib since V1.2.0.2
[![GeckoLib logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/197e417b0e192c49a53b39d7ad40764848f6959a.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

Fabric has all mobs removed and some features tweaked/removed due to limitations

This mod isn't updated often, because i don't work on this project much

No recipe book sorting on forge so use emi, rei or jei if you somehow didn't already

(If you find a bug, report it on the [curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wolfys-extra-expansion))

## ORES

>Cobalt

Cobalt is an uncommon metal, it's a gap in-between diamonds and iron, so a good replacement in case you cant find any diamonds for your weapons

![All cobalt related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed1d4bac541566205b9af94ca6bcb3d2cf4ac1a1.png)

>Experience Ore

Yes, it's just experience orbs in a stone block. But wait, you can craft bottles o' enchanting and glowstone alternatives! It is also used in the recipe for Life Essence

![All experience related items](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/b94a4a64b9c21c99e20be23cb456eefce1066903.png)

>Garnet

An uncommon ore with equipment just underneath diamonds, it also has less durability. It can also be used to craft the Tome of Healing and Life Essense

![All garnet related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/525ece2bf0c23f515e78c5f339c7279fa5efb8f7.png)

>Zinc

A common ore that has stats in-between stone and iron 

![All zinc related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa6665c4686de99be557d6d950bcfb101c0956a3.png)

>Lithium

A rare ore found deep underground, it's typically used to make explosives such as the Staff of Explosives, but has the same stats as iron, but slightly lower durability

![All lithium related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cba0557222991a3d004e3c5b52ad953c921e809.png)

>Platinum

A relatively common ore that is slightly better than zinc, it isn't very useful on its own, but is required to make Iridium Ingots

![All platinum related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/726239ae8ccf2b85441ace22a3ce35056b14109d.png)

>Iridium

An uncommon ore found mostly in deepslate, it cannot be crafted into an ingot without the addition of platinum, and has the same attack strength as diamond, but its armor doesn't have as much protection, and the pickaxe can only mine iron-tier blocks

![All iridium related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53244d42eba62cab1282412ddd625e798059d7e5.png)

>Frostium

An alloy crafted from packed ice and iron ingots, it has the same durability and strength as iron, but has the efficiency of gold, so it is very good for gathering materials. The only downside is that it has less enchantability than gold.

![All frostium related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68b724287e4a6a60750d38d8ec88c197b47c1bae.png)

>Zirconium

An ore found in the nether with slightly better stats than garnet, but more durable. it is used to craft the Tome of Deadly Toxins and the Fireball Cannon

![All zirconium related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ead79fb6f4c79b6d3dfe7f47eea8f6bf6139fd06.png)

>Opal

Another ore found in the nether, it isn't very good for equipment as it has the same strength and similar durability to stone, but its main use is to craft the Staff of Thunder

![All opal related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b25d0965952837f68a0bd02a4fd4d462d1e944fa.png)

>Onyx

A rare ore found in the end, it has the same strength as diamond but has more durability, and can be used to craft the Staff of Decay

![All onyx related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4df3e91f75f446dd46d0b86becad67399d2f90f.png)

>Sculkite

A unique ore found inside the Deep Dark, it has the same strength as diamond, but the same durability as netherite, however, it is very rare, and is used to craft the Tome of Echo and some soul-related items

![All sculkite related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0b2dbb8941d4be7f3307a793beaf397a0630c05.png)

> All overworld ores also have deepslate versions! (excluding sculkite)

![Most of the deepslate ores](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/76c642400ed02dafa1223b7faf31f24a6a67f9c1.png)

## TOMES

>Torn Parchment

The Torn Parchment is an item required to craft any tome and can be obtained by trading with librarians and cartographers at level 2 and wandering traders.

>Tome of Toxic Waste

Crafted using slime, poisonous potatoes and zirconium, it can poison enemies

>Tome of Pyromancy

This tome is crafted using cinder essence, fire charges and magma blocks, and instead of poisoning it instead sets things ablaze

>Tome of Healing

Instead of being a tome for attacking, it heals 8 hearts in one use. However, this tome has very low durability (only 5), and has a long cooldown. It is crafted using life essence, glistering melons and nether wart

>Tome of Echo

A tome thats crafted using echo shards, sculkite ingots and soul essence, it does high damage and has massive knockback

>Tome of Bitter Cold

A tome crafted from frostium, diamonds and prismarine crystals, it can summon ice blocks that explode on your enemies

![All the tomes, and the torn parchment](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/5beefcca53bd1d32484dd35de3eea508cf5e3805.png)

## SOULS

Souls are a special type of item in the game that can be either obtained by cooking soul sand in a blast furnace, or killing the Soul Harvester

>Soul

The soul doesnt do much by itself, however, it can be cooked in a blast furnace (again, but it will take a lot longer this time) to make Soul Essense

>Soul Essense

The main crafting material for all soul related items, it contains a lot of energy

>Soul Waraxe

The Soul Waraxe is a variant of battleaxe that does the most amount of damage out of all of the battleaxes, dealing 12 damage, at the cost of needing a nether star and sculkite to make

>Soul Scythe

A scythe that is slightly slower than a sword with 9.5 damage, it is slightly cheaper than the soul waraxe as it doesn't require sculkite, but still requires a nether star.

>Ghastly Cannon

An upgrade to the Fireworks Cannon, this weapon focuses more on single target high damage and can inflict the Wither effect on enemies

>Soul Harvester

A mob that can spawn naturally in deserts, mesas and soul sand valleys that can do very high damage and drops Souls or Soul Essense

![All the soul-related content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee14bb73ac6e52086909e9fd2d49b9731177a19c.png)

## WEAPONS

>Battleaxes

Battleaxes are a type of axe that deals 1 extra damage than an axe, but has 0.1 less attack speed (which is a suprisingly big difference). They are crafted using 5 of the material they are made of. (Example: Diamond Battleaxe needs 5 diamonds and 2 sticks to be made)

![All of the battleaxes, in order of damage/durability. (example: opal battleaxe has the same damage as copper, but more durability)](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/13d4ee5432e7b851e6a3af84793ef1d35c677c66.png)

>Sword of Flames

An iron sword with built in fire aspect, it is slightly faster than most weapons and also has an animated sprite

![The Sword of Flames alongside the Obsidian Stick](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/bc9b3c4edd6e0aef85a99411363a7a02eb546e89.png)

>Staff of Thunder

A very powerful staff that strikes lightning on foes, dealing high damage, but has a long cooldown

![The Staff of Thunder](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/379292c716b4a1dc24581c3aa98e150031269065.png)

>Staff of Decay

A staff that does decent damage and can wither enemies with a mediocre cooldown

![The Staff of Decay](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/a2aa61a526d49b4823a87b238797ccec60b6b74c.png)

>Staff of Frost

A staff that can freeze enemies for a while, and also has mediocre damage

![The staff of frost inside an icy cavern](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/391228deb0fa7c5379e390232801865871c05979.png)

>Staff of Explosives

A staff that summons a lit TNT that is thrown at your enemies, dealing massive damage, however, it has a very long coolown

![The staff of explosives inside a desert cave](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/397f676ed287aac0bbd07d81d06ca974dadfd5ff.png)

>Staff of Flameblast

A staff that is like an axe for the tome of pyromancy, as it does more damage and ignites targets for longer, but has a longer cooldown. They are also designed to be used together. Find the perfect sync between them!

![The Staff of Flameblast in the nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cef73295062b974dc7cde638cf90cfbe55d56518.png)

>Fireworks Cannon

A fireworks launcher that does high damage, but doesnt do area attack due to limitations, it also has a pretty long cooldown

>Fireball Cannon

An upgrade to the Fireworks Cannon, it shoots fireballs instead and does more damage, but has a longer cooldown

![Fireworks and Fireball Cannons](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/e86a0414eec578c8349d59785d08400eada29b36.png)

>Sporeshot

A very fast weapon with no cooldown, but low attack damage. Cheap to craft and can inflict poison

>Staff of Thorns

A staff that can poison and has mediocre damage

![The Staff of Thorns and Sporeshot alongside their ammunition](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/634632bf13d7c7a0cfd1c8fee9c65e509bca948a.png)

>Cobbled Snowballs

A version of the snowballs that can do two hearts of damage. That's it

![Some cobbled snowballs](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/dbbc8623ff241b18dc85e0925c7aa74441196a98.png)

>Amethyst Dagger

A weapon with extremely low durability (only 8), but it can do 8 damage and make the enemy bleed, dealing damage over time

![Amethyst Dagger in an amethyst geode](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/9bae224c8d847fa495d7a3c45473bb120cf1f47d.png)

>Blade of Legends

A very powerful weapon crafted with a nether star, 2 life essence, 2 sculkite ingots, and the forgotten blade hilt and blade, it can do 10.5 damage, and its stronger than the soul waraxe due to its fast attack speed

![The blade of legends, alongside all its materials](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/d8530f1d614a96cb6d50253c1ef3c90c40c3fc62.png)

>Copper Electromagnet

An artifact crafted from some copper, amethyst and nether wart, it can be used when its raining or thundering to give yourself Electrified, boosting your stats temporarily

![The copper electromagnet inside a factory](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/e013ce1f5f5a96176381d03090fa46b1af155616.png)

## STRUCTURES

>Sculk Shrine

Found underground, contains loot and either a forgotten blade hilt or forgotten blade blade

![A Sculk Shrine, complete with chests](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/bc3cbb1b8f97b6609a5344260a5fd5673eff6003.png)

## MOBS

>Magma Elemental

Found rarely in Nether Wastes and Basalt Deltas, they have high health and set anything that gets too close on fire, and also deal high knockback and high damage to their target, they can drop Blaze Powder, Magma Blocks, Fire Charges, and rarely, Cinder Essence, which is needed to craft the Tome of Pyromancy

![A Magma Elemental, standing next to some Cinder Essence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7PiSXTgj/images/6f9e81eed4af2b9616ff7e602929109fea190aee.png)

## MISC

>Obsidian Stick

An obsidian stick. It's for making the sword of flames. What else do you want me to say?

>Copper Stick

It's a copper stick. Used for the staff of lightning.

>Life Essense

Crafted from a lot of garnet and a few experience blocks, it can be crafted into a totem with 4 life essense, 4 gold blocks and 1 emerald block

>Forgotten Blade Fragments

Found in the Sculk Shrine underground, both the Hilt and the Blade are used to craft the Blade of Legends

>Smithing Hammers

Used to forge and compress different materials together, it can also be used as a weapon, but not a very strong one, considering its very low durability. Crafting with it takes away 1 durability

>Spore Extract

Extracted from Spore Blossoms, it's used as ammo for the Sporeshot

>Diamond Fragment

A piece of a diamond. Made by smashing a diamond with a smithing hammer

>Scorching Essence

An item dropped from Magma Elementals, it is used to make the Tome of Pyromancy

![All the miscellaneous items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ed02b36513496185eb0d17655e9b975c13d1140.png)

## ADVANCEMENTS

>Soul Collector

Obtain a Soul

>Waraxe of The Fallen

Craft the Soul Waraxe

>Extraction

Extract Soul Essense from a Soul

>Scythe of The Forgotten

Craft the Soul Scythe

>Lost to Time

Trade with a villager for a Torn Parchment

>Handheld Fireworks Launcher

Craft a Fireworks Cannon

>Arsonist

Upgrade the Fireworks Cannon into a Fireball Cannon

>Lightning Rod Mark 2

Craft a Staff of Thunder

>Staff of Darkness

Craft a Staff of Decay

>Cactus..? Rose??

Craft a Staff of Thorns

>Master of Flames

Craft a Tome of Pyromancy

>Master of Toxins

Craft a Tome of Toxic Waste

>Echoes of The Deep

Craft a Tome of Echo

>Delicate Magic

Find an Amethyst Shard

>Fragile Dagger

Craft an Amethyst Dagger

>Artificial Life

Craft some Life Essense

>Forgotten Blade

Craft the Sword of Legends

>Spore Spreader

Craft a Sporeshot

## VIDEOS

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iqm1GzxFMgw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Q&A

> Q: Will you backport fabric to below/above 1.19.2, 1.20.1 and 1.20.4? Or forge below/above 1.19.2 and 1.19.4?

A: No. Porting versions is buggy, annoying and generally unenjoyable. Modding is my passion project. If i dont enjoy modding, i won't mod. The only exception is maybe 1.18.2 Forge.

> Q: Are the fabric versions really beta?

A: Yes. They are. Fabric versions have a few extra bugs i can't fix as well as missing features.

> Q: Can i use this in my modpack?

A: Sure, You can give credit if you want, but i won't enforce it.
